headline.title: 用MicroPython和WASM在沙箱中运行Python代码
headline.summary: Simon Willison发布alpha版micropython-wasm包，通过在WebAssembly沙箱中运行MicroPython实现安全的Python代码执行，并用于Datasette Agent的插件。
headline.title_en: Running Python code in a sandbox with MicroPython and WASM
headline.summary_en: Simon Willison released an alpha package micropython-wasm that runs MicroPython in a WebAssembly sandbox for secure Python code execution, used as a plugin for Datasette Agent.
headline.reason: 该项目解决了长期以来的安全沙箱代码执行难题，技术可行性高，且已有实际应用，对开发者社区影响深远。
headline.reason_en: This project solves a long-standing challenge of secure sandboxed code execution, with high technical feasibility and practical applications, making a significant impact on the developer community.
